birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-browed bush chat is found in an area of semi-arid country in north-western India and eastern Pakistan. It has apparently strayed as far east as the Bharatpur area of Rajasthan and as far south as Goa and Pune,{{cite journal|author=Rao, Rahul|year=2007|title=Sighting of Stoliczka's Bushchat Saxicola macrorhynchus in Pune District, Maharashtra, Western India.|journal=J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |volume=92|issue=3|pages=417–418|url=https://biodiversitylibrary.org/page/48613976}} left|thumb|White-bellied sea eagle (Icthyophaga leucogaster) with captured duck Large numbers are sometimes found in urban wetlands such as in Kolkata and Goa, particularly during winter.{{cite journal|author=Abdulali, Humayun |year=1965|title=Behaviour of Lesser Whistling Teal [Dendrocygna javanica (Horsfield)] in Alipore Zoo, Calcutta|journal= J
